releases.author: 0xkz1
releases.description:
## What's Fixed
- `manifest.json`: Fix `authorUrl` (kazukiyunome.com → GitHub profile)
- `src/main.ts`: Use `window.setTimeout` instead of bare `setTimeout`
- `src/main.ts`: Use `activeDocument.createElement` instead of `document.createElement`
- `eslint.config.mts`: Add `activeDocument` to globals (fixes ESLint no-undef)
- `src/main.ts`: Fix `obsidianmd/ui/sentence-case` lint error ("markdown" → "Markdown")

releases.name: AssetWeaver 0.1.1

releases.author: 0xkz1
releases.description:
## AssetWeaver 0.1.0 — Initial Release

First public release of **AssetWeaver**, an Obsidian plugin that automatically generates structured markdown sidecar files for image assets using a local Vision-Language Model (VLM).

### Features
- Scans a target folder for images missing `.md` sidecar files
- Sends images to a local VLM (LM Studio / Ollama) for analysis
- Generates YAML frontmatter with title, category, tags, and description
- Detects backlinks from other vault notes automatically
- Skips corrupted / empty image files gracefully
- Works fully offline — your data never leaves your machine

### Requirements
- A running local VLM server compatible with the OpenAI API (e.g., LM Studio, Ollama)
- A vision-capable model (e.g., `qwen2-vl:7b`)

### Installation
See [README](https://github.com/0xkz1/obsidian-asset-weaver#installation) for manual installation instructions.
releases.name: AssetWeaver 0.1.0 - Initial Release
